content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Opinion request meeting participants

Date: 1/27/77

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Kenneth Finney

Subject: Item for Discussion:

May a judge use the legal description of his personal residence in designating this interest in real property instead of the street address?

Note that §87206(c) requires "address or other precise location of the real property."
